author: 45ck
text:
Quarterly architecture review completed on 2026-04-11.

Results:
- npm run depcruise: pass, 0 violations
- npm run knip: pass, 0 unused-symbol findings
- Domain import scan: 23 non-test domain files checked, 0 external imports
- Test co-location: 66/77 = 85.7% using src/**/*.ts excluding *.test.ts and index.ts, with colocated meaning sibling <basename>.test.ts
- Main architectural risk remains edge composition, not an active layer breach: presentation hooks still hand-wire concrete adapters and the spawned-child path is more provider-shaped than the prompt-turn runner path

Full report: docs/wip/reviews/2026-04-11-architecture-boundary-review.md
